competitors.name: Cursor
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Cursor IDE new features changelog 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Version 3.5 (2026-05-20): Cloud Agents — agents run in isolated cloud VMs with full terminal, browser, and desktop access; work across multiple repos in parallel; report results back to IDE asynchronously.

Version 3.3: Build in Parallel subagents, Composer 2.5 with multi-file refactor at file-tree scale, native Jira integration.

Version 3.2 (April 2026): /multitask command — async subagents parallelize requests; breaks down larger tasks into smaller chunks for a fleet of async subagents to tackle simultaneously. Single agent session can target multiple folders for cross-repo changes (frontend, backend, shared libraries).

Version 3.0 (April 2026): Run many agents in parallel across repos and environments: locally, in worktrees, in cloud, on remote SSH. Interface is 'centered around agents.'

Enterprise: Manage multiple Cursor teams from one place with security, governance, budget, and feature controls (GA). Shared canvases can be opened full-screen in browser; agents can embed buttons in canvases that run a specific prompt when clicked.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Version 3.5 (2026-05-20): Cloud Agents — agents run in isolated cloud VMs with full terminal, browser,

changes.description: Cloud Agents (v3.5, 2026-05-20)：在隔离云 VM 中运行，跨多个 repo 并行，异步向 IDE 报告结果
changes.evidence: 「agents run in isolated cloud VMs with full terminal, browser, and desktop access, can work across multiple repos in parallel, and report results back to your IDE asynchronously」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI = 快 session（云 VM），人 = 慢 session（IDE），异步回报机制与 meee2 的 session 同构协议高度重叠

changes.description: Enterprise 共享 Canvas：agents 可在 Canvas 内嵌可点击按钮触发特定 prompt，可全屏在浏览器打开
changes.evidence: 「Shared canvases can now be opened full-screen in the browser, and agents can embed buttons in canvases that will run a specific prompt when clicked」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #3：Descriptive canvas——flow 从真实行为中 emerge，Canvas 内嵌 agent 交互按钮直接指向该抽象

changes.description: /multitask 命令 (v3.2)：将大任务拆分给 async subagent 舰队并行处理，支持跨 repo 单 session
changes.evidence: 「/multitask, Cursor will run async subagents to parallelize requests instead of adding them to the queue, and breaks down larger tasks into smaller chunks for a fleet of async subagents to tackle simultaneously」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1 + #4：多 AI 快 session 并发 + 跨 repo artifact pull

key_findings: Cloud Agents (v3.5) 正式将 IDE 变为异步多 agent 运行时——AI 在云 VM 跑，人在 IDE 等待结果，session 同构正在落地
Enterprise 共享 Canvas 中 agent 可嵌入可执行按钮，人与 AI 在同一 canvas 内交互，这是 meee2 descriptive canvas 的直接竞争实现

competitors.name: OpenAI / ChatGPT
fetched_urls: WebSearch: OpenAI ChatGPT Canvas Projects new features agent tasks 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Workspace Agents: 'Workspace agents help teams get more done together across tools, can own entire workflows on their own, follow team processes, and be shared across teams so people can build once and use together.' Free period extended until July 6, 2026; credit-based pricing begins then.

Flow: A visual workflow builder where users can chain together natural language triggers and actions; Flow engine runs locally on Windows for speed and privacy.

Canvas Deprecation: Canvas will no longer be available in GPT-5.5 Instant or GPT-5.5 Thinking. Writing and coding functionality now supported directly in chat via writing blocks and code blocks.

ChatGPT Superapp Redesign: New interface launching in June 2026 for launching persistent AI agents that browse the web, manage files, and execute multi-step tasks without constant prompting.

Projects: Team users now support up to 40 uploaded files (from 20).
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Workspace Agents: 'Workspace agents help teams get more done together across tools, can own entire

changes.description: Workspace Agents：AI 可独立拥有完整工作流，跨工具协作，团队间共享复用，7月6日转为信用计费
changes.evidence: 「Workspace agents help teams get more done together across tools, can own entire workflows on their own, follow team processes, and be shared across teams so people can build once and use together」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI agent 在人的工作流图内，拥有独立 session；锚点 #4：跨工具 + 跨 owner 共享

changes.description: Flow 可视化工作流构建器：自然语言触发器 + 动作链，本地 Windows 运行
changes.evidence: 「ChatGPT will introduce Flow, a visual workflow builder where users can chain together natural language triggers and actions, with the Flow engine running locally on Windows for speed and privacy」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #3：可视化 flow 从自然语言行为 emerge，接近 descriptive-first 逻辑

changes.description: Canvas 在新模型中弃用，正文写作/代码改为 chat 内 block 形式，产品定位从 canvas-first 转向 agent-first
changes.evidence: 「Canvas will no longer be available in GPT-5.5 Instant or GPT-5.5 Thinking, with writing and coding functionality now supported directly in chat responses through writing blocks and code blocks」

key_findings: Workspace Agents 正式开放并将于7月6日信用计费——OpenAI 进入「AI 拥有并执行工作流」赛道，与 meee2 的 session 协议方向趋同
Flow 可视化工作流 + ChatGPT Superapp Redesign 同期上线，OpenAI 在一个月内完成 agent 层、flow 层、UI 层的全面改版

competitors.name: Windsurf (Codeium)
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Windsurf Codeium AI editor new features changelog 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

重大事件：2025年12月，Cognition AI（Devin 母公司）以约 2.5 亿美元收购 Windsurf，产品改名为 Devin Desktop。

Devin Integration: Devin cloud agent available directly inside Windsurf/Devin Desktop, included with every self-serve plan. Delegate tasks from a local session to Devin with one click; Devin runs on its own VM.

Agent Command Center: Spaces, Kanban view, and multi-agent management front and center, while full IDE remains accessible.

Wave 13 (2026): Cascade Memory System — remembers codebase structure and preferences across conversations. Enhanced Multi-Model Routing: automatically selects best AI model based on task type. New MCP Tool Support: integrates Supabase, Notion, GitHub. Better Terminal Integration. Supercomplete Accuracy Boost.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

重大事件：2025年12月，Cognition AI（Devin 母公司）以约 2.5 亿美元收购 Windsurf，产品改名为 Devin Desktop

changes.description: Cognition AI 以约 2.5 亿美元收购 Windsurf，产品改名 Devin Desktop，完成「本地 IDE + 云端 AI agent」的垂直整合
changes.evidence: 「In December 2025, Cognition AI (makers of autonomous coding agent Devin) acquired Windsurf for approximately $250 million」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：收购完成「慢 session（本地 IDE）+ 快 session（Devin 云端）」的垂直整合，与 meee2 session 同构架构直接竞争

changes.description: 一键将本地 session 任务委托给 Devin，Devin 在独立 VM 中执行并回报
changes.evidence: 「Delegate tasks from a local session to Devin with one click; Devin runs on its own VM」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：人（慢 session IDE）→ 一键触发 AI（快 session VM）→ 结果回报，这是 meee2 核心协议的工程实现

changes.description: Agent Command Center：Spaces + Kanban + 多 agent 管理，作为产品主界面
changes.evidence: 「The Agent Command Center (Spaces, Kanban view, and multi-agent management) is front and center, while the full IDE experience you know remains fully accessible」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：多 agent session 统一管理界面，meee2 的 session board 正在被复现

key_findings: Cognition AI 以 $250M 收购 Windsurf 并整合 Devin，完成了「本地 IDE（慢 session）+ 云端 AI agent（快 session）」的垂直整合——是市场上迄今最接近 meee2 session 同构架构的工程实现
Agent Command Center（Spaces + Kanban + 多 agent 管理）作为产品主界面，正在成为竞品中 session board 的代表实现

competitors.name: Claude.ai / Anthropic

Claude 4 Released: Claude Opus 4 and Sonnet 4 set new standards for coding, advanced reasoning, and AI agents.

Claude Cowork (新产品): 'Anthropic's agentic AI for knowledge work' — 独立产品页面，明确定位为知识工作的 agentic AI。

Routines in Claude Code (April 2026): Routines 功能进入 Claude Code，支持定时/周期性 AI session 执行。

Claude Code SDK: Build your own agents and applications using the same core agent as Claude Code. Released as extensible SDK.

New API capabilities: code execution tool, MCP connector, Files API, prompt caching up to one hour.

competitors.name: GitHub Copilot
fetched_urls: WebSearch: GitHub Copilot new features agent workspace background tasks 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

GitHub Copilot App launched at Microsoft Build 2026 (June 2026). A standalone desktop app for AI coding agents, expanding beyond editor integrations and command-line tools.

My Work Dashboard: Single view showing active sessions, open issues, pull requests, and background automations across connected repositories.

Canvases: 'Work surfaces shared between humans and agents that can display a plan, pull request, browser session, terminal, deployment, dashboard, or workflow state, and agents update the canvas as work progresses while developers can edit, reorder, approve, or redirect that work on the same surface.'

Agent Workspace: Every session runs in its own git worktree — a real, isolated copy of the branch. App handles every worktree automatically with no manual setup.

Background Tasks/Autopilot: Autonomous operation on bounded issues without developer present. /every command schedules recurring prompts and background tasks. Cloud automations run on schedule, respond to GitHub events, open issues, post comments.

Project Polaris: In-house AI model replacing GPT-4 Turbo in August 2026. Multi-agent VS Code support launched at Build 2026.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

GitHub Copilot App launched at Microsoft Build 2026 (June 2026). A standalone desktop app for AI coding

changes.description: GitHub Copilot App 独立桌面应用发布（Build 2026）：脱离 IDE 成为独立 agent 工作台
changes.evidence: 「GitHub introduced the Copilot app, a desktop application built for working with AI coding agents, at Microsoft Build 2026, expanding GitHub's Copilot product line beyond editor integrations and command-line tools into a dedicated workspace for directing several agents at once」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5：Peripheral 层——独立桌面应用管理多 agent session，不依附于 IDE，与 meee2 菜单栏产品形态直接竞争

changes.description: Canvases：人与 AI agent 实时共享工作面板，人可编辑、重排、审批、重定向
changes.evidence: 「work surfaces shared between humans and agents that can display a plan, pull request, browser session, terminal, deployment, dashboard, or workflow state, and agents update the canvas as work progresses while developers can edit, reorder, approve, or redirect that work on the same surface」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #3：这是 meee2 Descriptive Canvas 最直接的竞品实现——人和 AI 在同一面板上，agent 更新内容，人来审批/重定向

changes.description: Autopilot 模式 + /every 命令：AI 在无人在场时自主执行任务；支持定时/事件驱动周期性自动化
changes.evidence: 「Autopilot mode schedules autonomous operation on background tasks — Copilot acts on a bounded issue without a developer present. Additionally, an /every command schedules recurring prompts and background tasks」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1 + #5：AI 快 session 在后台运行，人不在场；Peripheral 层定时触发逻辑直接复现 meee2 的 routine 概念

changes.description: My Work dashboard：跨 repo 统一展示 active sessions、issues、PRs、background automations
changes.evidence: 「a single 'My Work' view showing active sessions, open issues, pull requests, and background automations across connected repositories」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨 repo（跨工具）session 统一视图，meee2 session board 的直接竞争实现

key_findings: 【威胁等级 hi → crit】GitHub Copilot App 独立桌面应用发布，四个核心特性（My Work、Canvases、Autopilot、/every）分别对应 meee2 的四条差异化锚点，是本周期最高优先级威胁
Canvases（人+AI 共享实时工作面板）已是 meee2 Descriptive Canvas 的直接工程实现，且已进入技术预览阶段开放给 Copilot Pro/Business/Enterprise 用户

competitors.name: Google Gemini / AI Studio
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Google Gemini AI Studio Workspace new features agent canvas 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Agent Designer (preview): Visual flow canvas for building agent workflows in Google Cloud.

Agent Engine Sessions + Memory Bank (GA): Give agents persistent context across interactions. Generally available as of Google Cloud Next 2026.

Workspace Studio: Skills can be created and invoked anywhere you use Gemini in Workspace. Convert standard operating procedures into skills for agentic automation.

Gemini Canvas: Write, code, and create in one collaborative space. Schedule Google Calendar meetings, create/edit Docs and Slides directly from canvas mode.

A2A Protocol: Agent-to-agent communication protocol announced at Google Cloud Next 2026.

AI Studio: Native Kotlin support, Google Workspace integrations, one-click deploy to Cloud Run. Google Workspace directly accessible from AI Studio apps.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Agent Designer (preview): Visual flow canvas for building agent workflows in Google Cloud.

Agent Engine

changes.description: Agent Engine Sessions + Memory Bank (GA)：agent 跨交互持久化上下文，正式全面开放
changes.evidence: 「Agent Engine Sessions and Memory Bank, which give agents persistent context across interactions, are generally available」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨 session artifact 持久化，agent 记忆层 GA，meee2 的 cross-session context 正在被 Google 规模化实现

key_findings: Agent Engine Sessions + Memory Bank 正式 GA：Google 为企业级 agent 提供持久化跨 session 记忆，是 meee2 cross-session artifact 架构的大规模竞品实现
A2A Protocol + Workspace Studio Skills 同期上线，Google 正在构建面向企业的 agent 协议层，方向与 meee2 锚点 #1 趋同

competitors.name: Linear
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Linear app changelog new features AI automation agent 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Linear Agent (March 2026, public beta): Available for all teams. Agent and Skills on all plans; Automations and Code Intelligence on Business/Enterprise.

Code Intelligence (May 2026): Gives Linear Agent controlled access to codebase — 'turning repositories into shared product context your whole team can use, allowing Linear Agent to reason about how your product actually works.'

MCP Support (April 2026): Linear Agent connects to external tools via MCP, brings external context into workflows.

Skills/Automation: Save recurring workflows as reusable skills. Trigger automatically when issues enter triage.

Releases (April 2026): Integrates with CI/CD, auto-updates issue statuses, generates release notes with Linear Agent.

Linear Diffs (May 2026): Review code diffs from any issue, iterate with agents.

Team Documents (June 2026): New team-level document feature.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Linear Agent (March 2026, public beta): Available for all teams. Agent and Skills on all plans; Automatio

changes.evidence: 「Linear Agent is now available in public beta for all teams. Agent and Skills are included on all Linear plans」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：项目管理场景下 AI agent 进入工作流，向 meee2「人在 agent 图内」方向延伸

changes.evidence: 「Code Intelligence gives Linear Agent controlled access to your codebase, turning repositories into shared product context your whole team can use, allowing Linear Agent to reason about how your product actually works」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨工具 artifact pull——代码库作为 artifact 被 agent 跨 session 访问

key_findings: Linear Agent 全面公测：项目管理 + AI agent 深度融合，Skills 让 AI 工作流可复用，方向与 meee2 的 session 协议趋同
Code Intelligence 让 Linear 从任务管理工具演变为「理解你产品的 AI 协作层」，开始触碰 meee2 的 cross-tool context 架构

competitors.name: Product Hunt AI 新品雷达
fetched_urls: WebSearch: new AI workspace productivity tool launch 2026 site:producthunt.com
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Unabyss (#1 launch day, 755 upvotes): 'Extracts, structures, and updates your context automatically, shares it with any AI tool via MCP.' MCP-native self-updating context layer for AI.

Yansu (#3 day rank): 'Learns from the work you already do, spots repeated tasks across files, messages, and workflows, then turns the best patterns into apps and automations.'

Polsia: 'AI system runs companies autonomously. Planning, coding, marketing, ops, every day.'

Mode AI: AI assistant connecting natively with Gmail, Docs, Outlook, Teams — draft emails, summarize docs, schedule meetings without switching tabs.

Espa: AI executive assistant for to-do's, scheduling, and email.

市场趋势：2026 Q2 PH 顶流均聚焦于「MCP-native context 共享」和「从既有工作行为中 emerge 工作流」，与 meee2 核心差异化锚点高度重合。
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Unabyss (#1 launch day, 755 upvotes): 'Extracts, structures, and updates your context automatically, shares i

changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨工具 artifact pull（F9）——Unabyss 正在用 MCP 实现 meee2 的 cross-tool artifact 共享协议

changes.evidence: 「learns from the work you already do, spots repeated tasks across files, messages, and workflows, then turns the best patterns into apps and automations」

PH 2026 Q2 趋势信号明确：「跨工具 context 共享」和「行为 emerge 工作流」正在成为新品首发的核心叙事

competitors.name: Notion AI
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Notion AI new features agent automation connector 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Developer Platform (May 13, 2026): Notion becomes a hub for AI agents. External Agents API: bring any agent (Claude, Codex, Decagon, etc.) into Notion out of the box.

Notion Workers: Hosted runtime for custom code, extend Notion without running own servers. Free during beta; credits-based from August 11, 2026.

Database Sync: Sync any data source via API into Notion databases, powered by Workers.

Custom Agents (Feb 24, 2026): Handle repetitive tasks (FAQs, status updates). Over 1M agents created since launch. Can now read/reply in private Slack channels.

Notion 3.4 (April 2026): Part 2 of AI features expansion.
competitors.content_hash:

changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：Notion 成为跨 agent artifact 汇聚层，但侧重数据 hub 而非 session 协议

competitors.name: Slack
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Slack new AI features agent canvas automation 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Canvas with AI: AI writing assistance built into canvas — summarize key points, extract action items, generate first draft.

Gen AI as Native Workflow Step: In every Slack workflow, a native AI step lets users write a prompt, select knowledge sources (channels, canvases, lists), and have LLM generate a response as part of a workflow.

Recurring Slackbot Tasks: Slackbot creates recurring tasks on a schedule (e.g., meeting agenda canvases). Slackbot can read, create, and edit lists with review/approve capability.

Agent Development: slack create agent command, enhanced Bolt framework, bring-your-own-LLM. Open source Starter Agent and Support Agent sample apps with Claude SDK and OpenAI SDK support.
competitors.content_hash:

Canvas with AI: AI writing assistance built into canvas — summarize key points, extract action items, generate

changes.evidence: 「Generative AI is now a native step in every Slack workflow; the step allows users to write a prompt, select knowledge sources (channels, canvases, lists), and have an LLM generate a response as part of a workflow」

key_findings: Slack AI 深度嵌入日常工作流，但产品范式仍是「AI 增强的团队通讯」，与 meee2 的 session 协议无结构性重叠

competitors.name: Reflect

competitors.raw_snapshot:

MCP Server: Allows Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor to search, read, edit, and write to Reflect notes directly from terminal or chat interface.

AI Models: Supports GPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet. Faster AI voice transcriber, AI assistant, and 'chat with your notes.'

Advanced AI Search: Chat with notes using AI ('like talking directly with your brain'). Custom prompt saving.

Auto-generated link summaries: When saving a link, Reflect generates a short AI summary.

Real-time sync across devices. Recent updates: offline image availability, auto-backlink selection from text.
competitors.content_hash:

MCP Server: Allows Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor to search, read, edit, and write to Reflect notes directly

changes.description: MCP Server：允许 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 直接读写 Reflect 笔记，成为 cross-tool context 源
changes.evidence: 「Reflect has an MCP server that allows AI coding assistants like Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor to search, read, edit and write to your Reflect notes directly from the terminal or chat interface」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：笔记作为跨工具 artifact，通过 MCP 实现 cross-tool pull，与 meee2 F9 artifact 共享方向一致但范围有限

key_findings: Reflect 加入 MCP 阵营，笔记正在成为跨 AI 工具共享的 context 源，但产品仍是个人笔记工具，与 meee2 无结构性竞争

competitors.name: Raycast
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Raycast new features AI agent changelog 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

v0.63 (June 4, 2026): Teams can share AI Agents, AI Commands, and Dictation Styles across the organization.

v2.0 Public Beta: Windows support, new UI, files & folders in root search, system-wide AI dictation.

Presets → Agents: Reused across chats; update agent config once, applies to all chats.

Memory: Chats remember context about you, feel more personal.

Skills: Custom instructions and knowledge for frequent tasks. Auto-loaded dynamically when relevant.

MCP Server Support: Install MCP servers, use in Quick AI and AI Chat.

OpenRouter Support: Access wide range of public models.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

v0.63 (June 4, 2026): Teams can share AI Agents, AI Commands, and Dictation Styles across the organization

changes.description: v0.63 (2026-06-04)：团队共享 AI Agents、AI Commands、Dictation Styles
changes.evidence: 「teams can now share AI Agents, AI Commands, and Dictation Styles across the organization, making it easier to give everyone access to the same setups and work more consistently」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨 owner 共享 agent 配置，但 Raycast 仍是 launcher，无 session 协议层

changes.description: v2.0 公测：Windows 支持 + 全系统 AI 语音输入，覆盖范围大幅扩展
changes.evidence: 「Raycast 2.0 Is Now in Public Beta: Windows Support, Faster Search, and Built-in AI dictation allows you to dictate text directly through Raycast across any app, system-wide」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #5：Peripheral 层扩张至 Windows，meee2（macOS 菜单栏）的差异化空间收窄

key_findings: Raycast v2.0 进入 Windows 公测 + 团队共享 AI Agents，Peripheral 层竞争加剧；但 Raycast 仍是 launcher 定位，无 session 协议层，与 meee2 有结构性差异

competitors.name: Replit
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Replit AI agent multi-agent workspace new features 2026
competitors.raw_snapshot:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Agent 4: Fastest and most versatile Replit Agent. Built around four pillars: Design Freely, Build Together, Ship Anything, Move Faster.

Multi-user vibe coding via kanban: Teams manage tasks through diverse role definitions, turning individual concepts into team realities.

Agent can build other agents: Automate complex and repetitive workflows using natural language.

Design tools: multi-select, hover/active state, responsive overrides in UI. Mobile and web apps, landing pages, decks, videos in same project with shared context.

Stripe in collaborative workspaces: Teams build, test, monetize same app together.

SEO Agent: Reviews published apps for search engine discoverability, one-click fixes.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

Agent 4: Fastest and most versatile Replit Agent. Built around four pillars: Design Freely, Build Together

changes.description: Agent 4 + 多用户 kanban 协同编程：团队在同一 workspace 共同构建应用
changes.evidence: 「Multi-user vibe coding via the kanban is a significant milestone for enterprises, useful for turning individual concepts into team realities」

key_findings: Replit Agent 4 强化多用户协同，但仍是「在浏览器里一起 build app」的范式，与 meee2 的 session 协议无结构重叠

competitors.name: Superwhisper

v2.13.0 (April 2026, macOS): Claude Code and Open Code agent integration — dictate prompts to coding agents without typing. Integrates with Cursor, Claude Code, Codex.

Cloud AI: GPT-5.1, Opus 4.5, Gemini, Grok support added.

Bulk vocabulary import via CSV (May 2026): Import specialized terminology lists.

Redesigned UI: New history, full text search, segmented playback, multi-select delete, upgraded model library.

Realtime streaming UI: Live transcription, faster Parakeet, British English spelling, input device auto-select, language model search.
competitors.content_hash:
来源：WebSearch 结果，非官方原文

v2.13.0 (April 2026, macOS): Claude Code and Open Code agent integration — dictate prompts to coding agents

changes.description: v2.13.0：接入 Claude Code + Codex，语音 → coding agent 直通管道
changes.evidence: 「Superwhisper added Claude Code and Open Code agent integration in v2.13.0 (April 2026, macOS only). Superwhisper integrates with tools like Cursor, Claude Code, and Codex so you can dictate prompts to coding agents without typing」

key_findings: Superwhisper 成为 coding agent 的语音输入层，专注 voice-to-agent 管道，与 meee2 无结构重叠

alerts.headline: 【威胁升级 hi→crit】GitHub Copilot App 发布：独立桌面应用 + 人与 AI 共享 Canvas + Autopilot 后台任务，四条核心锚点全面重叠
alerts.evidence: 「work surfaces shared between humans and agents that can display a plan, pull request, browser session, terminal, deployment, dashboard, or workflow state, and agents update the canvas as work progresses while developers can edit, reorder, approve, or redirect that work on the same surface」
alerts.action_suggestion: 立即深入研究 Copilot App 的 Canvas 实现细节（数据模型、实时同步机制）。meee2 需要在「live link vs snapshot」这条线上确立明确差异：Copilot Canvas 是状态展示层还是真正的 artifact live link？若是前者，这是 meee2 的核心护城河；若是后者，需要加速 F9 artifact 的 demo 和对外叙事

alerts.headline: Cognition AI $250M 收购 Windsurf 并整合 Devin：「一键从本地 session 委托给云端 AI session」已上线，meee2 session 同构架构正被工程复现
alerts.evidence: 「Delegate tasks from a local session to Devin with one click; Devin runs on its own VM」
alerts.action_suggestion: Windsurf/Devin Desktop 已工程实现「人（慢session）→ 一键触发 AI（快session）→ 异步回报」协议，但仅限 IDE/开发场景。meee2 需要强调：(1) 跨场景（不限于代码），(2) 同一协议（而非两个独立系统的调用），(3) live link（而非任务委托模型）

alerts.headline: Cursor Cloud Agents + Enterprise Canvas：AI 在云 VM 异步运行并在共享 Canvas 内嵌可执行按钮，session 同构 + descriptive canvas 双锚点均被触碰
alerts.evidence: 「agents run in isolated cloud VMs with full terminal, browser, and desktop access, can work across multiple repos in parallel, and report results back to your IDE asynchronously」 + 「agents can embed buttons in canvases that will run a specific prompt when clicked」
alerts.action_suggestion: Cursor Enterprise Canvas 仍是 IDE 内的 UI 功能，而非跨工具的 live link。meee2 应强化「跨工具 artifact（不限于 IDE）」和「Canvas 状态 = 产品真实状态而非 snapshot」的叙事差异

alerts.headline: Claude Cowork 上线：Anthropic 以「agentic AI for knowledge work」定位直接进入 meee2 市场
alerts.evidence: 「Claude Cowork | Anthropic's agentic AI for knowledge work」
alerts.action_suggestion: 需立即深入调研 Claude Cowork 产品细节：是否有 session 协议层？是否支持人与 AI 同等地位的协作？这可能是 meee2 最大的平台级威胁（Anthropic 是 meee2 的底层模型供应商）。建议团队 demo Claude Cowork 并做逐条 feature 对比

alerts.headline: Workspace Agents 7月计费启动：AI 可独立拥有工作流、跨工具执行、团队间共享，市场教育节点来临
alerts.evidence: 「Workspace agents help teams get more done together across tools, can own entire workflows on their own, follow team processes, and be shared across teams so people can build once and use together」
alerts.action_suggestion: Workspace Agents 7月计费将成为市场教育节点——大量用户将第一次体验「AI 拥有并执行工作流」。meee2 应在此窗口期强化「session 同构（人=慢 session，不只是 AI 拥有流程）」的独特叙事，区分于「AI agent 执行人的任务」的旧框架

alerts.headline: Agent Engine Sessions + Memory Bank GA：Google 为企业 agent 提供跨交互持久化记忆，cross-session context 架构规模化落地
alerts.evidence: 「Agent Engine Sessions and Memory Bank, which give agents persistent context across interactions, are generally available」
alerts.action_suggestion: Google Memory Bank GA 将跨 session 记忆变为企业标配。meee2 需要明确「artifact live link」与「agent memory」的架构差异：memory 是 agent 内部状态，live link 是人与 AI 共享的外部 artifact——这是 meee2 的核心区分点

alerts.headline: Linear Agent 公测 + Code Intelligence：项目管理工具开始理解代码库，向「理解产品的 AI 协作层」演变
alerts.evidence: 「Code Intelligence gives Linear Agent controlled access to your codebase, turning repositories into shared product context your whole team can use, allowing Linear Agent to reason about how your product actually works」
alerts.action_suggestion: Linear 路径是：任务管理 → 代码理解 → 产品协作层，终点可能与 meee2 趋同。建议观察 Linear 是否会在 Code Intelligence 之后推出「跨 session 的产品知识库」功能
